body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/route/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/route/import 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于批量同步里程打卡信息到智能费控，调用本接口后可在智能费控-工作台-个人报销 查看个人打卡里程信息，财务人员可在 智能费控-财务处理-台账管理-里程台账 查看企业员工里程信息。
![332bb8f8465540af9b06b84b547da0a5_IMAGE.png](https://s3gw.cmbchina.com/lw36.01-public-prd/public-3efaf323-0710-4c6f-b8cd-118b498a8a13)
![bd410824eaef4d73b50249f5aa2661e8_IMAGE.png](https://s3gw.cmbchina.com/lw36.01-public-prd/public-f8b393ad-a387-4691-93e0-83850abf20cf)

**调用本接口时请注意**
* 单批次最多添加20条记录，仅支持全部成功，失败的信息在返回报文中查看具体的错误信息。
* 单条里程记录中必须存在一个开始点和一个结束点，途经点最多1000个。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"routeInf","required":true,"label":"%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"USR10000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"mileage","required":true,"label":"%E6%80%BB%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"52.09","desc":"%20%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E8%BF%98%E6%9C%AA%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E7%9A%84%E6%83%85%E5%86%B5%20endFlag%3D%E2%80%9C0%E2%80%9D%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%AD%A4%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%85%AC%E9%87%8C%E6%95%B0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E6%98%AF0","maxLength":"17,2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startTime","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024-10-31%2014%3A37%3A17","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endTime","required":true,"label":"%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024-10-31%2014%3A40%3A07","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startAddressName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E7%82%B9%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9C%81xx%E5%B8%82xx%E5%8C%BAxx%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93xx%E8%B7%AFxx%E5%8F%B7xx%E5%B0%8F%E5%8C%BA","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startAddressDetailName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E7%82%B9%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9C%81xx%E5%B8%82xx%E5%8C%BAxx%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93xx%E8%B7%AFxx%E5%8F%B7xx%E5%A4%A7%E5%8E%A6","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"startDeviceNumber","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E8%AE%BE%E5%A4%87%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"IOS0000000000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endAddressName","required":true,"label":"%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E7%82%B9%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9C%81xx%E5%B8%82xx%E5%8C%BAxx%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93xx%E8%B7%AFxx%E5%8F%B7","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endAddressDetailName","required":true,"label":"%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E7%82%B9%E8%AF%A6%E7%BB%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9C%81xx%E5%B8%82xx%E5%8C%BAxx%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93xx%E8%B7%AFxx%E5%8F%B7","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"endDeviceNumber","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%93%E6%9D%9F%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E8%AE%BE%E5%A4%87%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"IOS0000000000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"routeRemark","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","desc":"","maxLength":"512"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"routeNumber","label":"%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","desc":"%20%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C**%E5%90%8C%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%B8%8B%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D**%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%BA%E5%90%8E%E7%BB%AD%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%85%E5%9B%BE%E7%89%87%E5%81%9A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","maxLength":"32","required":true}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"routeNodeInfList","required":true,"label":"%E6%9C%AC%E6%AC%A1%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E7%9A%84%E6%89%80%E6%9C%89%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"nodeType","required":true,"label":"%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"%E2%80%9C0%E2%80%9D","desc":"%20%E2%80%9C0%E2%80%9D-%E8%B5%B7%E7%82%B9%0A%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D%20-%E7%BB%88%E7%82%B9%0A%E2%80%9C2%E2%80%9D%20-%E9%80%94%E5%BE%84%E7%82%B9"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"addressName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9%E5%9C%B0%E7%82%B9","exampleValue":"","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"addressDetailName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9%E7%B2%BE%E7%A1%AE%E5%9C%B0%E7%82%B9","exampleValue":"xx%E7%9C%81xx%E5%B8%82xx%E5%8C%BAxx%E8%A1%97%E9%81%93xx%E8%B7%AFxx%E5%8F%B7xx%E5%B0%8F%E5%8C%BA","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"longitude","required":true,"label":"%E7%BB%8F%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"120.19081265920326","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"latitude","required":true,"label":"%E7%BA%AC%E5%BA%A6","exampleValue":"30.1924007359704","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"crtTime","required":true,"label":"%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E7%82%B9%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4","exampleValue":"2024-10-31%2014%3A37%3A17","desc":"%20yyyy-MM-dd%20HH%3Amm%3Ass"}},{"elementData":{"type":"DOUBLE","name":"nodeMileage","required":true,"label":"%E8%B7%9D%E7%A6%BB%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%AA%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9%E8%B7%9D%E7%A6%BB","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E7%82%B9%E4%BC%A00%EF%BC%88%E5%BD%93nodeType%3D%E2%80%9C0%E2%80%9D%EF%BC%89"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"nodeNumber","label":"%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","required":true,"maxLength":"32","desc":"%20%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E6%89%93%E5%8D%A1%E7%82%B9%E7%9A%84%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86%EF%BC%8C%EF%BC%8C**%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%80%E9%87%8C%E7%A8%8B%E4%B8%8B%E4%B8%8D%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D**%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%BA%E5%90%8E%E7%BB%AD%E8%A1%A5%E5%85%85%E5%9B%BE%E7%89%87%E5%81%9A%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":""}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"EROOR2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMsg","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"xxx%E4%B8%8D%E6%AD%A3%E7%A1%AE","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","exampleValue":"false","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
[
    {
        "routeInf": {
            "empNumber": "USR10000",
            "mileage": 8,
            "startTime": "2024-10-31 14:37:17",
            "endTime": "2024-10-31 14:40:07",
            "startAddressName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx小区",
            "startAddressDetailName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx大厦",
            "startDeviceNumber": "IOS0000000000",
            "endAddressName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号",
            "endAddressDetailName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号",
            "endDeviceNumber": "IOS0000000000",
            "routeRemark": "里程备注"
        },
        "routeNodeInfList": [
            {
                "nodeType": "0",
                "addressName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx小区",
                "addressDetailName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx小区",
                "longitude": "120.19081265920326",
                "latitude": "30.1924007359704",
                "crtTime": "2024-10-31 14:37:17",
                "nodeMileage": 0
            },
            {
                "nodeType": "2",
                "addressName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx大厦",
                "addressDetailName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx大厦",
                "longitude": "120.19080357737928",
                "latitude": "30.19237757059328",
                "crtTime": "2024-10-31 14:37:50",
                "nodeMileage": 3
            },
            {
                "nodeType": "1",
                "addressName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx大厦",
                "addressDetailName": "xx省xx市xx区xx街道xx路xx号xx大厦",
                "longitude": "120.19080357737928",
                "latitude": "30.19237757059328",
                "crtTime": "2024-10-31 14:37:59",
                "nodeMileage": 5
            }
        ]
    }
]
```
### 响应报文
```json
{      
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",    
    "success": true,    
    "message": "成功"    
}    
```
```json
 {
    "returnCode": "EROOR2",
    "errorMsg": "xxx不正确",
    "success": false,
    "message": "失败"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | SUC0000|无| 成功|
  | E0001|业务异常| 请求失败根据提示修改入参重新请求|
  | EROOR1|系统异常| 请求失败联系管理员|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/route/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/route/import

接口描述

本接口适用于批量同步里程打卡信息到智能费控，调用本接口后可在智能费控-工作台-个人报销 查看个人打卡里程信息，财务人员可在 智能费控-财务处理-台账管理-里程台账 查看企业员工里程信息。

调用本接口时请注意

  • 单批次最多添加20条记录，仅支持全部成功，失败的信息在返回报文中查看具体的错误信息。
  • 单条里程记录中必须存在一个开始点和一个结束点，途经点最duo1000个。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 无 成功
E0001 业务异常 请求失败根据提示修改入参重新请求
EROOR1 系统异常 请求失败联系管理员
